properties.name: alternate
properties.description: Changes the Popover's color scheme to the opposite of the currently select one (e.g. from light to dark)

properties.name: anchor
properties.description: Sets the Popover's anchor element. Prefer using the [`anchor` slot](/components/popover/code/#anchor-slot) if possible.

properties.name: arrow
properties.description: Adds a small triangle to indicate the trigger element.

properties.name: dismiss-button-aria-label
properties.description: Overrides the default "Close" aria-label of Dismiss button when manual mode is enabled.

properties.name: layout
properties.description: Can be used to enable a condensed layout with smaller paddings and gaps.

properties.name: manual
properties.description: Sets the Popover to manual mode, disabling light-dismiss (clicking outside) and displaying a close button.

properties.name: open
properties.description: Sets the open state of the Popover

properties.name: offset
properties.description: Customizes the gap (in `px`) between the Popover and the trigger element.

properties.name: placement
properties.description: Controls the position of the Popover, relative to its anchor element.

events.name: open
events.description: Fired when the Popover is opened.

events.name: close
events.description: Fired when the Popover is closed.

slots.name: default
slots.description: For the default content of the Popover.

slots.name: footer
slots.description: Add additional content to the bottom of the Popover.

methods.name: updatePosition
methods.description: Updates the Popover's position related to its anchor element.
